{{CargoRelic
|name=Quantum Cat
|class_id=20807
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-15
|source=
|description=On May 15, 1870 AD, the world's first Fortune Cat appeared in Japan and became popular across Asia.<br>Cat became popular in the Edo Period of Japan as people believed that the mysterious cats could protect their food from rats. Cats gradually became a symbol of wealth. Later, people started placing Fortune Cats at home as they symbolized good fortune and abundance.
|fame=30
|art=19
|fth=29
|civ=28
|tech=48
|ss1=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +20000
|ss2=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +40000
|ss3=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +60000
|ss4=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +100000
|ss7=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +100000<br>In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +40000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill I.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Travel Speedup Output +5%
}}
